name: Fractal Thoughts
implicitMods: Socketed Skill Gems get a 80% Cost & Reservation Multiplier
explicitMods: 178% increased Evasion and Energy Shield
+36% to Critical Strike Multiplier if Dexterity is higher than Intelligence
15% increased Dexterity if Strength is higher than Intelligence
1% increased Elemental Damage per 10 Dexterity
+2 to Maximum Life per 10 Intelligence
flavourText: "The more the warrior understood Tangmazu's gift, the less the mask aided him.
His dreams were filled with divine laughter."
- Tenth Song of the Islands

socketedItems.secDescrText: Enchants your shield with the power of storms, which lashes out to deal arcing lightning damage to attackers when you block them.
explicitMods: Deals 990 to 2970 Lightning Damage
Chains +1 Times
Buff grants +26% Chance to Block Spell Damage while holding a Shield
Buff grants Immunity to Shock
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will apply a cost & reservation multiplier to supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
explicitMods: This Gem gains 100% increased Experience
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants evasion to you and your allies.
explicitMods: +2 metres to radius
You and nearby allies gain 1620 additional Evasion Rating
You and nearby allies gain 30% more Evasion rating
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants elemental resistances and elemental ailment immunity to you and your allies.
explicitMods: +1.9 metres to radius
You and nearby allies gain +39% to all Elemental Resistances
You and nearby allies are Immune to all Elemental Ailments
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Behemoth Gorget
explicitMods: 19% increased Attributes
26% increased Dexterity
2% increased Damage per 15 Dexterity
24% reduced Duration
25% increased effect
53% increased Critical Strike Chance during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Cinderswallow Urn
explicitMods: +13 to Maximum Charges
Recharges 5 Charges when you Consume an Ignited corpse
68% of Damage from your Hits cannot be Reflected during Effect
Enemies Ignited by you during Effect take 9% increased Damage
Recover 3% of Energy Shield when you Kill an Enemy during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: A controlled burn is sometimes necessary for new life.

name: Rumi's Concoction
explicitMods: +12% Chance to Block Attack Damage during Effect
+6% Chance to Block Spell Damage during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: "Yesterday I was clever, so I wanted to change the world.
Today I am wise, so I am changing myself."
-Rumi of the Vaal

name: Wine of the Prophet
enchantMods: Used when you Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy, if not already in effect
explicitMods: +60 to Maximum Charges
70% increased Charges per use
Grants a random Divination Buff for 20 seconds when Used
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: "To proclaim a vision of the future is to make it so,
for those that have the will, and the way!"
- High Templar Andronicus

name: Tempest Loop
explicitMods: +27 to all Attributes
+96 to Dexterity
+79% to Fire Resistance
craftedMods: Non-Channelling Skills have -7 to Total Mana Cost

name: Headhunter
explicitMods: +55 to Strength
+58 to Dexterity
+60 to maximum Life
21% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters
When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds
flavourText: "A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

name: Oriath's End
explicitMods: 28% increased Charge Recovery
Enemies you Kill during Effect have a 30% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Damage of a Random Element
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: Ennui prevailed, until inspiration sparked
a mote of flame, kindled by fury
and all in his path were obliterated.

name: Rapture Dash
implicitMods: 1 to 6 Added Attack Lightning Damage per 200 Accuracy Rating
explicitMods: 34% increased Evasion Rating
12% increased Rarity of Items found
+46% to Cold Resistance
+48% to Lightning Resistance
30% increased Movement Speed
15% increased Stun and Block Recovery

socketedItems.secDescrText: Dive through enemies, dealing weapon damage. If dual wielding attacks with both weapons, dealing the damage of both in one hit. Only works with Daggers, Claws, and One-Handed Swords.
socketedItems.builtInSupport: Supported by Level 1 Cast On Critical Strike
explicitMods: When Dual Wielding, Deals 75% Damage from each Weapon combined
+0.6 seconds to Attack Time
10% increased Attack Speed

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

Supported Skills deal 4% more Damage per Power Charge
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Create a Tornado that hinders and repeatedly damages enemies around it. It will move forward for a duration, during which your projectiles can collide with it to deal damage as though it was an enemy. Then it will chase down enemies for a secondary duration, and reflect a portion of the damage it took from your projectiles to them in addition to its own damage.
explicitMods: Deals 31 to 46 Physical Damage
Deals Damage every 0.25 seconds
Base duration is 1.50 seconds
Base secondary duration is 4.00 seconds
During initial Duration, can be hit by your Projectiles up to 20 times
Reflects 10% of Damage Taken to Enemies
Enemies in range are Hindered
Maximum 1 Tornado
Tornado has 20% increased Movement Speed
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports attack skills.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 54% increased Attack Speed
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Wing of the Wyvern
implicitMods: 21% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills
explicitMods:
Trigger a Socketed Spell when a Hit from this
Weapon Freezes a Target, with a 0.25 second Cooldown
Adds 165 to 258 Cold Damage
Adds 168 to 278 Chaos Damage
22% increased Attack Speed
Your Chaos Damage can Freeze
Battlemage
flavourText: Fear flies by night,
a bone, cold as death,
all that remains
of hope's whisper.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills that hit enemies, causing them to gain bonuses while you have unholy resonance of lightning, physical and chaos, and to grant unholy resonance of damage types other than the highest one in a hit. There is a maximum of 50 unholy resonance for each damage type. Cannot support triggered skills, instant skills, orb skills, brands, skills with a reservation, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods:
Hits with Supported Skills for which the highest Damage Type is Lightning, Physical or Chaos cause you to gain 25 Unholy Resonance of the other types per second for 2 seconds
Lose 5 Unholy Resonance per second of each type you are not gaining
Supported Skills deal 7% more Damage per 10 of lowest Unholy Resonance
Supported Skills have 90% chance to ignore Enemy Lightning and Chaos Resistance while each Unholy Resonance is at least 25
Supported Skills have 90% chance to ignore Enemy Physical Damage Reduction while each Unholy Resonance is at least 25
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: It was a delicate balancing act for Malachai to ensure the loyalty
of his three students - each as ambitious as they were depraved.

Hits with Supported Skills for which the highest Damage Type is Lightning, Physical or Chaos cause you to gain 25 Unholy Resonance of the other types per second for 2 seconds
Lose 5 Unholy Resonance per second of each type you are not gaining
Supported Skills deal 7% more Damage per 10 of lowest Unholy Resonance
Supported Skills have 90% chance to ignore Enemy Lightning and Chaos Resistance while each Unholy Resonance is at least 25
Supported Skills have 90% chance to ignore Enemy Physical Damage Reduction while each Unholy Resonance is at least 25
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: It was a delicate balancing act for Malachai to ensure the loyalty
of his three students - each as ambitious as they were depraved.

name: Beast Coil
explicitMods: +90 to Dexterity
+57 to Strength and Intelligence
+42% to Global Critical Strike Multiplier
+81% to Cold Resistance
craftedMods: Non-Channelling Skills have -7 to Total Mana Cost
